prediction.reasoning: Based on historical IBM stock volatility (approximately 25-30% annualized) and assuming a random walk model with no drift over the 22-day period. The confidence intervals are constructed using standard statistical methods where the stock price follows a log-normal distribution. The point estimate remains at the current price under the efficient market hypothesis assumption.
